BLACKPILL I/O CARRIER
---------------------

Expansion prototyping board for the STM32F411 BlackPill module.

.. image:: /images/hardware/01_BlackPillInterface/27_BPInterface_functionality_top.png
   :alt: 3D View of the BlackPill Interface Board
   :align: center
   :width: 70%
      
     
.. admonition:: Version of this documentation
   :class: note

   **Current Version:** V1.0.0
